subject: [PATCH v3 2/3] mm/madvise: skip device-private PMDs in cold and pageout walks

2026-07-10.patch_summary: This patch modifies the madvise_cold_or_pageout_pte_range function to skip device-private PMDs in cold and pageout walks, preventing a potential panic when encountering an unexpected PMD softleaf. The change downgrades the VM_BUG_ON assertion to a VM_WARN_ON_ONCE warning, allowing unexpected cases to be logged instead of panicking. Additionally, it removes the thp_migration_supported guard as it is no longer necessary due to changes in pmd_is_migration_entry and pmd_is_device_private_entry behavior.
